summary: Full backend + frontend verification of the new admin panel (JWT auth), file upload flows, and public/admin content merging. Backend pytest: 24/24 passing including auth (login success, wrong-password 401, /auth/me with/without token), admin-protected GET /contact and /volunteer (401 without token, list with token), public POST /contact + /volunteer still work, /api/admin/gallery full CRUD with public /api/files/{id} serve, /api/admin/reports PDF-only enforcement (non-PDF → 400), /api/admin/projects lifecycle (create + add photo + delete photo + delete project). Frontend E2E: /admin without token redirects to /admin/login; wrong password shows 'Invalid username or password' error toast (only 1 wrong attempt used, then successful login clears counter — brute-force limit not hit); correct login lands on dashboard with all 5 tabs; Gallery/Reports/Projects upload flows all worked end-to-end and appeared on public /gallery (44 of 44 photographs after upload), /annual-reports and /projects (dynamic-projects-section + dynamic-project-card visible, detail page /projects/view/{id} renders); delete flows all worked; logout returns to /admin/login. Email notifications fire — backend logs show 'Notification email sent: <id>' for both contact and volunteer submissions (Resend testing-mode delivery to lalionare@gmail.com, as documented). No critical or minor bugs found this iteration.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: admin_router uses APIRouter dependencies=[Depends(get_current_admin)] which correctly returns 401 on every /api/admin/* route without a token — verified with 4 unauth requests.
server.py L302-311: GET /api/contact and /api/volunteer now require admin — confirmed 401 without Bearer and 200 with valid token; no _id leaks (response_model_by_alias=False in place).

save_upload() correctly rejects non-image for /gallery (400) and non-PDF for /reports (400); file_id returned is queryable via public /api/files/{id} which returns proper image/jpeg or application/pdf content-type with 24h cache header.

Frontend admin/api.js correctly attaches Bearer token via axios interceptor and reads from localStorage 'aasw_admin_token'; Admin.jsx verifies token via /auth/me on mount and redirects to /admin/login on 401 — verified.

Minor code-quality note (not a bug): server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup')/('shutdown') — these will be removed in a future FastAPI version. Recommended to migrate to the lifespan context manager. Non-blocking for now.

Minor: emailer.send_notification is fire-and-forget via asyncio.create_task; a Resend failure is logged but never surfaces to the user (per spec). Verified in logs — old resend error 'You can only send testing emails to your own email address' has been superseded once NOTIFY_EMAIL was set to lalionare@gmail.com; recent submissions log 'Notification email sent: <uuid>'.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_aasw_api.py (rewrote for new auth + admin CRUD coverage: 24 tests)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 5 admin tabs + upload/delete + public merge + logout + redirect verified)

seed_data_creation: During UI test: 1 gallery item, 1 report, 1 project (all TEST_ prefixed) created via admin UI and deleted at end of run. During pytest: TEST_ contact/volunteer/gallery/report/project records created and deleted by autouse cleanup fixture. Only the real 'Aman Ishu' contact record was preserved (never touched).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file /app/backend/tests/test_aasw_api.py is now the canonical regression suite covering auth + admin CRUD + public forms + file serve. It uses BASE_URL from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env, admin credentials from constants (matching /app/memory/test_credentials.md), and includes a session-scoped autouse cleanup fixture that purges TEST_-prefixed contact/volunteer records via the admin API after the run. Note: only ONE wrong-password test is executed to stay clear of the 5-fail 15-min brute-force lockout — a successful subsequent login clears the counter. Delete individual test data with the delete-* data-testids in the admin UI. Public gallery count increases from 43 to 44+ when items are uploaded (Gallery.jsx merges [...dynamic, ...GALLERY]).
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found; feature-verification pass only.
